.*.description: Name of the field defined within the data contract entities.

Bad value.description: When a value is incompatiable. e.g. trying to cast 'hello' as int.

Blank.description: When a mandatory value is missing.

error_code.description: The code you want to report in the error report.

error_message.description: The error message you want to report in the error report.

error_level.description: Whether the error should be a record rejection or file/submission rejection. Defaulted to record.

is_informational.description: Whether to raise the error as a warning or not. Defaulted to false.

reporting_entity.description: Whether to rename the entity shown in the error report. Defaults to the entity name in the dischema.
